rules.rationale: Штатное завершение и уничтожение общей TDLib-сессии принадлежат lifecycle boundary.
Authorization state machine, authentication challenges, terms acceptance и database key принадлежат brokered authorization flow.
getCurrentState является входом в ordered state snapshot и request-chain completeness.
User, contact и profile identity операции принадлежат users/contacts/profile workflow.
Chat containers, lists, folders, topics и secret chats принадлежат chat navigation workflow.
Messages, history, search, text parsing, drafts, polls и reactions принадлежат message interaction workflow.
File transfer, generated files, downloads, uploads и media import принадлежат file lifecycle.
Groups, channels, membership, invites, moderation, boosts и giveaway administration принадлежат community administration.
Bot, inline, callback, game и bot-testing operations принадлежат bot workflow.
Web App, LoginUrl и attachment-menu methods принадлежат Mini App launch lifecycle.
Sticker, custom emoji, reaction и animation catalogs принадлежат sticker/emoji lifecycle.
Stories, calls, group-call message plane, video chats и live streams принадлежат real-time media workflow.
Account security, privacy, notification exceptions, sessions, devices и push принадлежат account settings.
Business account, managed bots и quick replies принадлежат Business workflow.
Payments, asset transactions, localized payment helpers, Stars, gifts, Premium, Passport и affiliates принадлежат digital assets workflow.
Statistics, revenue graphs, storage и network accounting принадлежат analytics/resource management.
Localization, links, themes, proxies, application verification, logging и explicit test/custom calls принадлежат platform utilities.
